_note: Ready-to-insert interactive_image block for an alveolus (Class 11 Breathing and Exchange of Gases -- pairs with the respiratory-system round already shipped). Image keyed via prepare_illustration.py's new 'white' background mode (added 2026-07-15) -- the source PNG had an opaque white background despite the prompt asking for solid deep-charcoal #121316 (visible live in ChatGPT's UI as dark, but the downloaded raster was flattened onto white). Hotspots authored by visual inspection of the cropped/keyed webp, NOT yet browser-verified live -- recommend a quick pass in the prototype to confirm tap-target placement before shipping, especially any nested/adjacent structures.
alt: A lung alveolus during gas exchange
caption: 📸 Tap each dot to explore — or hit 'Test yourself' to play Label Sprint

hotspots.label: Alveolar sac
hotspots.detail: A cluster of alveoli at the end of the smallest airways, greatly increasing surface area for gas exchange.

hotspots.label: Alveolus wall
hotspots.detail: A single layer of thin epithelial cells that allows fast diffusion of gases.

hotspots.label: Capillary network
hotspots.detail: A dense mesh of tiny blood vessels wrapping every alveolus, maximising gas exchange.

hotspots.label: Red blood cells
hotspots.detail: Carry oxygen picked up from the alveolus and release carbon dioxide into it.

hotspots.label: Pulmonary arteriole
hotspots.detail: Brings deoxygenated blood to the capillary bed around the alveolus.

hotspots.label: Pulmonary venule
hotspots.detail: Carries newly oxygenated blood away from the alveolus toward the heart.

generation_prompt: A clean modern educational anatomy illustration of a lung alveolus (air sac) during gas exchange, shown as a close-up cutaway cross-section. Show these structures clearly separated and individually distinguishable: the alveolar sac cluster, a single alveolus with its thin single-layer wall, the surrounding capillary network wrapped around it, and red blood cells inside the capillary. Style: semi-realistic medical-textbook illustration, soft even studio lighting, smooth clean surfaces, a muted anatomical palette (pink alveolar tissue, muted crimson and slate-blue for the capillary blood). Calm and flat: no glossy highlights, no neon, no glow, no 3D-render sheen. Composition: centered and filling the frame, generous even margins. Solid uniform deep-charcoal background, hex #121316, edge to edge. Absolutely no text, no labels, no numbers, no letters, no leader lines, no arrows, no legend, no watermark -- the illustration only. Landscape 4:3, high resolution.
